title: The Crushers
overview: Hiroki and Tsukasa are living and working at Kenji’s scuba diving shop-cum-bar. The pair hope to one day emulate Kenji and open a place of their own. But it turns out Kenji has also been doing some shady jobs on the side. When he starts acting strangely, Hiroki and Tsukasa take action.

title: Views of the Peak
overview: Kenji falls unconscious after seeing hallucinations of Hiroki and Tsukasa. Katsuragi then arrives on the scene and orders Hiroki and Tsukasa to “crush” Kenji because of the secrets the latter has discovered. Taking Hiroki’s objections into consideration, Tsukasa proposes a way for the two of them to take care of the situation without crushing Kenji.

title: Jobs
overview: Hiroki is delighted that he and Tsukasa have managed to open a store of their own. His joy is short-lived, however, as Katsuragi soon whisks Tsukasa away on another job. His mission this time is to take control of Chinese Mafia member Inui in order to assassinate a certain VIP. However, manipulating Inui’s memories turns out not to be straightforward.

title: A Trap for Hayashi
overview: Tsukasa and Katsuragi have found out that Hayashi has been in Japan the whole time. They set about trying to capture him, but Hayashi’s countermoves make a mockery of their efforts. Meanwhile, Hiroki has been left alone in the store by Tsukasa and is becoming emotionally unstable.

title: Locks
overview: Tsukasa finds himself face to face with the fugitive Hayashi. While Tsukasa expresses a mixture of joy at their reunion and bitterness at having been abandoned in the first place, it appears that the two of them are now at cross purposes. Back at the hotel, Satoru goes to the bar and meets Jin, a woman connected to the Company. Satoru is wary, but Jin has an offer to make him.

title: Back Door
overview: Hayashi is determined to take Tsukasa with him, even if he has to alter Tsukasa’s memories in order to do so. Tracing back along the path of those memories reveals Tsukasa’s dark past. Nevertheless, Hayashi seems to have succeeded in reaching his former protégé’s peak, but Tsukasa has an all-or-nothing trick up his sleeve.

title: Revenge
overview: Meiling is also an image user, but unlike Hiroki and the others, she hasn’t been provided with a complete peak. However, that is exactly the type of pet that the Company prefers. With Meiling in tow, Company employee Long appears in front of Dahao, ready to settle an old score for the CEO.

title: Intrigue
overview: Has Tsukasa been asked to become an employee? Satoru’s innocent question sparks a moment of doubt about Tsukasa in Hiroki’s mind. Pushing those thoughts aside, Hiroki sets off with Satoru on a mission to crush a VIP.

title: The Way the Wind Blows
overview: After collapsing from malnourishment, Hiroki has been taken to hospital. While making preparations to leave, he feels a breeze blowing up from below him. However, things that should be swaying in that breeze appear stationary when he looks in a mirror…

title: Broken Fish Tanks
overview: Tsukasa crushed his own peak giver. Devastated at the discovery of this secret, Hiroki demands answers. Tsukasa tries to brush off his questions, but this time Hiroki refuses to be placated and ends up running away. How will Tsukasa respond to the prospect of losing Hiroki?

title: Reunion
overview: Satoru is ecstatic ahead of his much longed-for reunion with Hayashi. However, the figure who awaits him is no longer the Hayashi he remembers. As Satoru struggles to accept the truth, Tsukasa appears to sympathize with him, while secretly putting in place a plan to get Hiroki back and crush Satoru.

title: Carrier Pigeon
overview: Tsukasa and his co-conspirators have used Meiling’s butterfly to forcibly bring Hiroki before them. Hiroki is shocked to realize that Tsukasa has brainwashed Satoru into believing that Hiroki was the one who crushed Hayashi. Trapped by Satoru’s door, Hiroki resorts to desperate measures in an effort to escape.

title: Rainbow
overview: Satoru read Hayashi’s message and learned the truth about everything, but was then shot by Long. Tsukasa thinks this signals the completion of his plans and goes to be with Hiroki. However, Hiroki has a question for Tsukasa and the pair must find an answer between them.
